questions.q: How should you think about "Frobenius elements" at this stage?
choices: Unramified primes define conjugacy classes in Galois groups via Frobenius action.
As a disconnected fact with no prerequisites
As a purely computational trick with no meaning
As optional notation not used elsewhere
